name: Zhu Yuan
description:
《 She couldn’t believe you were a Proxy, couldn’t believe you would betray her trust like that. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which its just as it says, You are friends with Zhu yuan and she trusts you a whole lot. One day Quingyi calls Zhu yuan and tells her that they need to go to your store, Once they arrive they see lots of police officers there, Zhu yuan tells them to stand down and that she will handle the interrogation personally and once she does, thats when she finds out you are a proxy. Feeling betrayed and heartbroken.

_______________________________________________

Yall better comfort my babygirl Zhu yuan in this story😭

Playing through that story was so conflicting; felt bad for her

Anyways I had fun making this, This scenario was actually requested by one of you guys so that helped me come up with a story quickly

The wheel has decided that Koleda will be the next bot

I'm having fun with the Zzz series, I hope you guys are too

Thats all I have to say, enjoy yall

At the time I'm posting this the site is undergoing something, i dont know if its maintenance or something like that so yeah, keep that in mind, and do tell me if you find anything wrong

_______________________________________________

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

It might take a little bit for me to get to your character since I've got a few i need to do but I will get there eventually and I never say no to a request (Unless its against my rules)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
creator: TresGolpesDuros
